Dashboard.title: Welcome to Radius Bundles
Dashboard.description: Manage your product bundles and increase your average order value.

SetupGuide.heading: Get started with Product Bundles
SetupGuide.subheading: Use this personalized guide to get your app up and running.

enableAppEmbed.title: Enable the app embed
enableAppEmbed.description: Activate the Product Bundles app embed in your theme editor. This is required for bundle widgets, analytics tracking, and storefront functionality to work on your store.

createFirstBundle.title: Create your first product bundle
createFirstBundle.description: Select a bundle type — Fixed Bundle, BOGO, Volume Discount, or Mix & Match — add products, configure pricing, and publish to start selling.

customizeSettings.title: Customize your settings
customizeSettings.description: Configure your global display preferences and style the bundle widget to match your store's branding — adjust layout, colors, typography, and button styles.

previewStorefront.title: Preview your live storefront
previewStorefront.description: Visit your online store to verify how bundles appear to customers. Check the widget layout, discount display, and add-to-cart experience on a real product page.

monitorAnalytics.title: Monitor bundle analytics
monitorAnalytics.description: Track key metrics like bundle views, add-to-cart rate, conversion rate, and revenue generated across all your bundles from the analytics dashboard.

QuickActions.heading: Quick Actions
QuickActions.description: Common tasks and shortcuts for managing your product bundles

Features.heading: Powerful Bundle Features
Features.bundleTypes: Multiple bundle types — Fixed, BOGO, Volume, Mix & Match
Features.discounts: Flexible discounts — Percentage, fixed amount, custom pricing
Features.styleCustomizer: Style customizer — Match your store's branding with zero code
Features.analytics: Built-in analytics — Track views, conversions, and revenue

Bundles.recentActiveDesc: Your most recently updated active bundles.
Bundles.errorDesc: Something went wrong while loading your bundles. Please try refreshing the page.
Bundles.noActiveDesc: Create and activate a bundle to see it here.
Bundles.name: Name

MediaCard.title: Update your plan
MediaCard.description: Unlock advanced features and priority support. Upgrade today to get the most out of your bundles.

support.title: Need any support?
support.description: Step by step guide to install and activate BundleSuite on your store.

features.title: Upcoming new features
features.description: Watch our video tutorials to learn how to use BundleSuite.

helpDocs.title: Help docs
helpDocs.description: Explore app features with video & documentation guides.

Videos.videoDescription: Bundles are a great way to increase average order value.

Review.helpBySharing: Help us by sharing your experience

0.title: How would you rate our app?
0.description: Your feedback helps us improve the experience for everyone. It will take you less than a minute.

1.title: We're sorry to hear that!
1.description: Help us improve by telling us what went wrong.

2.title: We can do better!
2.description: Let us know what we can improve to make your experience better.

3.title: Thanks for the feedback!
3.description: We'd love to know how we can make this even better for you.

4.title: Great to hear!
4.description: What did you like most? Your feedback helps us keep improving.

5.title: Awesome!
5.description: We're thrilled you love our app! Consider sharing your experience.

AppEmbed.notEnabledDesc: The bundle functionalities and analytics won't work correctly on your storefront until the app embed is activated in your theme editor.
AppEmbed.notEnabledYet: App embed is not enabled yet
